tool_args.label: Total Overtime YTD Variance All Agencies
Major drivers of favorable non-reimbursable YTD variance
tool_args.raw_text: Major drivers of the favorable non-reimbursable YTD variance, including underruns in COVID-19 response, lower SAP requirements and departmental controls at NYCT; lower maintenance requirements, tightened management procedures and weather at the LIRR; lower maintenance, less traffic congestion and unscheduled service at MTA Bus; favorable weather, revised T&E crew requirements, and a budget allocation adjustment at MNR; lower requirements and managerial efficiencies at B&T; and revised MTAPD deployment assumptions at MTAHQ.

payload.claim_text: Major drivers of the favorable non-reimbursable YTD variance, including underruns in COVID-19 response, lower SAP requirements and departmental controls at NYCT; lower maintenance requirements, tightened management procedures and weather at the LIRR; lower maintenance, less traffic congestion and unscheduled service at MTA Bus; favorable weather, revised T&E crew requirements, and a budget allocation adjustment at MNR; lower requirements and managerial efficiencies at B&T; and revised MTAPD deployment assumptions at MTAHQ.
payload.subject: Non-reimbursable overtime YTD variance

evidence_refs.source_quote: Major drivers of the favorable non-reimbursable YTD variance, including underruns in COVID-19 response, lower SAP requirements and departmental controls at NYCT

tool_args.label: Major drivers of favorable reimbursable YTD variance
tool_args.raw_text: The favorable reimbursable YTD variance is resulted of lower capital support at NYCT; less capital project activity at MNR and the LIRR; and higher coverage requirements for MTAPD at MTA HQ.

payload.claim_text: The favorable reimbursable YTD variance is resulted of lower capital support at NYCT; less capital project activity at MNR and the LIRR; and higher coverage requirements for MTAPD at MTA HQ.
payload.subject: Reimbursable overtime YTD variance

evidence_refs.source_quote: The favorable reimbursable YTD variance is resulted of lower capital support at NYCT; less capital project activity at MNR and the LIRR; and higher coverage requirements for MTAPD at MTA HQ.
